benchmarks.name: bregman_false_positive_rate
benchmarks.description: Bregman false-positive rate (incoherent but not certifiable).

benchmarks.name: win_rate_traded_only
benchmarks.description: Win rate over traded-only paper decisions.

benchmarks.name: cvar
benchmarks.description: Conditional VaR / Expected Shortfall of paper returns (closer to 0 is better).

benchmarks.name: fill_realism_rejection_rate
benchmarks.description: Realistic-fill (fantasy-fill) rejection rate; very high => feed/book problem.

benchmarks.name: exploration_validation_separated
benchmarks.description: Exploration trades are tracked separately from validation evidence.

benchmarks.name: bregman_executable_depth_ok
benchmarks.description: Certified Bregman legs pass executable-depth proof before sizing up.

benchmarks.name: significance_passed
benchmarks.description: Sharpe/Sortino/Calmar improvement clears required significance thresholds.

benchmarks.name: walkforward_passed
benchmarks.description: Walk-forward / purged-CV validation passed (not a single-slice artifact).

algorithmic_edge_audit.note: PAPER-only audit; fails loudly + caps readiness when the edge engine is inactive (Bregman off / 0 scans), pytest is red, fill realism or after-cost PnL is missing, or equity mismatches > 1%.

production_readiness_verdict.note: PAPER-only; readiness requires statistically credible positive after-cost expectancy under a passing validation contract.
